entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, the primary crop studied for breeding and adoption in Mali

entities.name: ADOPTION
entities.description: The process of farmers accepting and using improved crop varieties

entities.name: PANICLE ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The physical structure and arrangement of the sorghum panicle

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITIES
entities.description: The physical and chemical characteristics of sorghum grains

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The broader geographic region where breeding efforts for guinea race germplasm occurred

entities.name: GUINEA RACE GERMPLASM
entities.description: Local genetic material of the guinea race of sorghum used as base material for breeding

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER PER PANICLE
entities.description: The quantity of grains produced on a single panicle

entities.name: DROOPINESS
entities.description: The degree to which the sorghum panicle hangs or droops

entities.name: LAXNESS
entities.description: The looseness of the panicle structure

entities.name: THRESHABILITY
entities.description: The ease with which grains are separated from the panicle during processing

entities.name: SUDAN SAVANNA ZONE
entities.description: The specific ecological zone in Mali where the study was conducted

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the research on sorghum breeding and farmer preferences took place

entities.name: PANICLE SORTING ACTIVITY
entities.description: A participatory research method used to identify farmer preferences for panicle traits

entities.name: QUALITATIVE INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A research method used to gather detailed knowledge and preferences from sorghum producers

entities.name: MANDE
entities.description: A specific location in Mali where interviews and sorting activities were conducted

entities.name: DIOÏLA
entities.description: A specific location in Mali where interviews and sorting activities were conducted

entities.name: PEST CONTROL
entities.description: The management and prevention of pests affecting sorghum crops

entities.name: STORAGE DURATION
entities.description: The length of time sorghum grains remain viable and high-quality in storage

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced per plant or area

entities.name: OPEN PANICLES
entities.description: A specific panicle architecture preferred by farmers for disease and pest control

entities.name: DROOPY ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: A panicle structure that hangs, preferred by farmers for disease and pest control

entities.name: HARD GRAINS
entities.description: Grains with a firm texture preferred for storage and processing

entities.name: FLOUR AND GRITS RATIO
entities.description: The proportion of flour to grits produced during grain processing

entities.name: GLUME QUALITIES
entities.description: Characteristics of the glumes that influence the ease of threshing

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Organized efforts to develop improved crop varieties based on specific objectives
